scope_notes: Foreman-orchestrated MMM product-fix wave retargeted by CS2 to adapt legacy DomainAuditBuilder generation workflow behavior into the MMM app. Current scope now includes legacy-generation hook/component adaptations (useAIMPSGeneration, useIntentGeneration, AIGeneratedCriteriaCards, EnhancedCriteriaGenerator), runtime generate/accept/approve pathways for MPS/intent/criteria, canonical-domain routing behavior for cards without source_domain_id, and refreshed governance artifacts aligned to current-head behavior and evidence.
